!user.is_securedrop) {\\n      return false;\\n    }\\n\\n    return true;\\n  }\\n\\n  function filterUsers(query, tab = activeTabName()) {\\n    const normalizedQuery = query.trim().toLowerCase();\\n\\n    return userData.filter((user) => {\\n      if (!matchesTab(user, tab)) {\\n        return false;\\n      }\\n\\n      if (normalizedQuery === \\"\\") {\\n        return true;\\n      }\\n\\n      const countries = Array.isArray(user.countries) ? user.countries.join(\\" \\") : \\"\\";\\n      const searchText = userSearch.normalizeSearchText([\\n        user.primary_username,\\n        user.display_name,\\n        user.bio,\\n        user.city,\\n        user.country,\\n        user.subdivision,\\n        countries,\\n      ]);\\n      return userSearch.matchesQuery(searchText, normalizedQuery);\\n    });\\n  }\\n\\n  function highlightMatch(text, query) {\\n    return userSearch.highlightQuery(text || \\"\\", query);\\n  }\\n\\n  function sortedByDisplayName(entries) {\\n    return [...entries].sort((a, b) =>\\n      (a.display_name || \\"\\").localeCompare(b.display_name || \\"\\", undefined, {\\n        sensitivity: \\"base\\",\\n      }),\\n    );\\n  }\\n\\n  function buildBadges(user, tab) {\\n    let badgeContainer = \\"\\";\\n\\n    if (user.is_public_record) {\\n      if (tab === \\"all\\") {\\n        badgeContainer +=\\n          \'<span class=\\"badge\\" role=\\"img\\" aria-label=\\"Attorney listing\\">⚖️ Attorney</span>\';\\n      }\\n      if (user.is_automated) {\\n        badgeContainer +=\\n          \'<span class=\\"badge\\" role=\\"img\\" aria-label=\\"Automated listing\\">🤖 Automated</span>\';\\n      }\\n      return badgeContainer;\\n    }\\n\\n    if (user.is_securedrop) {\\n      if (tab !== \\"securedrop\\") {\\n        badgeContainer +=\\n          \'<span class=\\"badge\\" role=\\"img\\" aria-label=\\"SecureDrop listing\\">🛡️ SecureDrop</span>\';\\n      }\\n      if (user.is_automated) {\\n        badgeContainer +=\\n          \'<span class=\\"badge\\" role=\\"img\\" aria-label=\\"Automated listing\\">🤖 Automated</span>\';\\n      }\\n      return badgeContainer;\\n    }\\n\\n    if (user.is_globaleaks) {\\n      if (tab !== \\"globaleaks\\") {\\n        badgeContainer +=\\n          \'<span class=\\"badge\\" role=\\"img\\" aria-label=\\"GlobaLeaks listing\\">🌐 GlobaLeaks</span>\';\\n      }\\n      if (user.is_automated) {\\n        badgeContainer +=\\n          \'<span class=\\"badge\\" role=\\"img\\" aria-label=\\"Automated listing\\">🤖 Automated</span>\';\\n      }\\n      return badgeContainer;\\n    }\\n\\n    if (user.is_admin) {\\n      badgeContainer +=\\n        \'<span class=\\"badge\\" role=\\"img\\" aria-label=\\"Administrator account\\">⚙️ Admin</span>\';\\n    }\\n\\n    if (user.is_verified) {\\n      badgeContainer +=\\n        \'<span class=\\"badge\\" role=\\"img\\" aria-label=\\"Verified account\\">⭐️ Verified</span>\';\\n    }\\n\\n    if (tab === \\"all\\" && !user.has_pgp_key) {\\n      badgeContainer +=\\n        \'<span class=\\"badge\\" role=\\"img\\" aria-label=\\"Info-only account\\">📇 Info Only</span>\';\\n    }\\n\\n    return badgeContainer;\\n  }\\n\\n  function buildAutomatedListingCard(user, query, tab) {\\n    const safeDisplayName = userSearch.escapeHtml(user.display_name || \\"\\");\\n    const safeBio = userSearch.escapeHtml(user.bio || \\"No description\\");\\n    const safeProfileUrl = userSearch.escapeHtml(user.profile_url || \\"#\\");\\n    const displayNameHighlighted = highlightMatch(user.display_name, query);\\n    const bioHighlighted = user.bio ? highlightMatch(user.bio, query) : \\"\\";\\n    let listingType = \\"SecureDrop listing\\";\\n    if (user.is_public_record) {\\n      listingType = \\"Public record listing\\";\\n    } else if (user.is_globaleaks) {\\n      listingType = \\"GlobaLeaks listing\\";\\n    }\\n    const safeListingType = userSearch.escapeHtml(listingType);\\n\\n    return `\\n      <article class=\\"user\\" aria-label=\\"${safeListingType}, Display name:${safeDisplayName}, Description: ${safeBio}\\">\\n        <h3>${displayNameHighlighted}</h3>\\n        <div class=\\"badgeContainer\\">${buildBadges(user, tab)}</div>\\n        ${bioHighlighted ? `<p class=\\"bio\\">${bioHighlighted}</p>` : \\"\\"}\\n        <div class=\\"user-actions\\">\\n          <a href=\\"${safeProfileUrl}\\" aria-label=\\"View read-only listing for ${safeDisplayName}\\">View Listing</a>\\n        </div>\\n      </article>\\n    `;\\n  }\\n\\n  function buildUserCard(user, query, tab) {\\n    const safeDisplayName = userSearch.escapeHtml(\\n      user.display_name || user.primary_username || \\"\\",\\n    );\\n    const safeUsername = userSearch.escapeHtml(user.primary_username || \\"\\");\\n    const safeBio = userSearch.escapeHtml(user.bio || \\"No bio\\");\\n    const safeProfileUrl = userSearch.escapeHtml(user.profile_url || \\"#\\");\\n    const displayNameHighlighted = highlightMatch(\\n      user.display_name || user.primary_username,\\n      query,\\n    );\\n    const usernameHighlighted = highlightMatch(user.primary_username, query);\\n    const bioHighlighted = user.bio ? highlightMatch(user.bio, query) : \\"\\";\\n\\n    if (user.is_public_record || user.is_globaleaks || user.is_securedrop) {\\n      return buildAutomatedListingCard(user, query, tab);\\n    }\\n\\n    const userType = user.is_admin\\n      ? `${user.is_verified ? \\"Verified\\" : \\"\\"} admin user`\\n      : `${user.is_verified ? \\"Verified\\" : \\"\\"} User`;\\n    const safeUserType = userSearch.escapeHtml(userType);\\n    const badges = buildBadges(user, tab);\\n\\n    return `\\n      <article class=\\"user\\" aria-label=\\"${safeUserType}, Display name:${safeDisplayName}, Username: ${safeUsername}, Bio: ${safeBio}\\">\\n        <h3>${displayNameHighlighted}</h3>\\n        <p class=\\"meta\\">@${usernameHighlighted}</p>\\n        ${badges ? `<div class=\\"badgeContainer\\">${badges}</div>` : \\"\\"}\\n        ${bioHighlighted ? `<p class=\\"bio\\">${bioHighlighted}</p>` : \\"\\"}\\n        <div class=\\"user-actions\\">\\n          <a href=\\"${safeProfileUrl}\\" aria-label=\\"${safeDisplayName}\'s profile\\">View Profile</a>\\n        </div>\\n      </article>\\n    `;\\n  }\\n\\n  function appendSection(panel, label, users, query, tab) {\\n    if (!users.length) {\\n      return;\\n    }\\n\\n    if (label) {\\n      const sectionLabel = document.createElement(\\"p\\");\\n      sectionLabel.className = \\"label searchLabel\\";\\n      sectionLabel.textContent = label;\\n      panel.appendChild(sectionLabel);\\n    }\\n\\n    const userListContainer = document.createElement(\\"div\\");\\n    userListContainer.className = \\"user-list\\";\\n    userListContainer.innerHTML = users.map((user) => buildUserCard(user, query, tab)).join(\\"\\");\\n    panel.appendChild(userListContainer);\\n  }\\n\\n  function renderPanelContent(\\n    panel,\\n    users,\\n    query,\\n    tab,\\n    { introMarkup = \\"\\", showEmptyMessage = true } = {},\\n  ) {\\n    panel.innerHTML = introMarkup;\\n\\n    if (users.length === 0) {\\n      if (showEmptyMessage) {\\n        panel.insertAdjacentHTML(\\n          \\"beforeend\\",\\n          \'<p class=\\"empty-message\\"><span class=\\"emoji-message\\">🫥</span><br>No users found.</p>\',\\n        );\\n      }\\n      return;\\n    }\\n\\n    const realUsers = users.filter(\\n      (user) => !user.is_public_record && !user.is_globaleaks && !user.is_securedrop,\\n    );\\n    const withPgp = realUsers.filter((user) => user.has_pgp_key);\\n    const infoOnly = realUsers.filter((user) => !user.has_pgp_key);\\n\\n    if (tab === \\"all\\") {\\n      appendSection(panel, \\"\\", sortedByDisplayName(users), query, tab);\\n      return;\\n    }\\n\\n    if (tab === \\"verified\\") {\\n      appendSection(panel, \\"\\", withPgp, query, tab);\\n      appendSection(panel, \\"📇 Info-Only Accounts\\", infoOnly, query, tab);\\n      return;\\n    }\\n\\n    appendSection(panel, \\"\\", users, query, tab);\\n  }\\n\\n  function displayUsers(users, query) {\\n    const panel = activePanel();\\n    const tab = activeTabName();\\n    if (!panel) {\\n      return;\\n    }\\n\\n    renderPanelContent(panel, users, query, tab);\\n  }\\n\\n  function panelIntroMarkup(panelId) {\\n    return document.getElementById(panelId)?.querySelector(\\".dirMeta\\")?.outerHTML || \\"\\";\\n  }\\n\\n  function buildDefaultPanelMarkup(tab) {\\n    const panel = document.createElement(\\"div\\");\\n    const introMarkup = panelIntroMarkup(tab);\\n    const showEmptyMessage = tab !== \\"public-records\\";\\n\\n    renderPanelContent(panel, filterUsers(\\"\\", tab), \\"\\", tab, {\\n      introMarkup,\\n      showEmptyMessage,\\n    });\\n\\n    return panel.innerHTML;\\n  }\\n\\n  function refreshInitialMarkup() {\\n    if (document.getElementById(\\"public-records\\")) {\\n      initialMarkup.set(\\"public-records\\", buildDefaultPanelMarkup(\\"public-records\\"));\\n    }\\n\\n    if (document.getElementById(\\"all\\")) {\\n      initialMarkup.set(\\"all\\", buildDefaultPanelMarkup(\\"all\\"));\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  function handleSearchInput() {\\n    const query = searchInput.value.trim();\\n    const panel = activePanel();\\n    const currentScopeLabel = scopeLabel();\\n    const hasQuery = query.length > 0;\\n\\n    if (clearIcon) {\\n      clearIcon.style.visibility = hasQuery ? \\"visible\\" : \\"hidden\\";\\n      clearIcon.hidden = !hasQuery;\\n      clearIcon.setAttribute(\\"aria-hidden\\", hasQuery ? \\"false\\" : \\"true\\");\\n    }\\n\\n    if (query.length === 0) {\\n      if (panel && initialMarkup.has(panel.id)) {\\n        panel.innerHTML = initialMarkup.get(panel.id);\\n      }\\n      if (hasRenderedSearch) {\\n        setSearchStatus(`Showing all ${currentScopeLabel}.`);\\n      }\\n      hasRenderedSearch = false;\\n      return;\\n    }\\n\\n    const filteredUsers = filterUsers(query);\\n    displayUsers(filteredUsers, query);\\n    setSearchStatus(\\n      filteredUsers.length === 1\\n        ? `Found 1 ${currentScopeLabel.slice(0, -1)} matching \\"${query}\\".`\\n        : `Found ${filteredUsers.length} ${currentScopeLabel} matching \\"${query}\\".`,\\n    );\\n    hasRenderedSearch = true;\\n  }\\n\\n  function buildAttorneyFilterSearch() {\\n    const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);\\n    const country = attorneyCountryFilter?.value.trim() || \\"\\";\\n    const region = attorneyRegionFilter?.value.trim() || \\"\\";\\n\\n    if (country) {\\n      params.set(\\"country\\", country);\\n    } else {\\n      params.delete(\\"country\\");\\n    }\\n\\n    if (region) {\\n      params.set(\\"region\\", region);\\n    } else {\\n      params.delete(\\"region\\");\\n    }\\n\\n    const nextSearch = params.toString();\\n    return nextSearch ? `?${nextSearch}` : \\"\\";\\n  }\\n\\n  function applyAttorneyFiltersFromSearch(search) {\\n    if (!attorneyCountryFilter || !attorneyRegionFilter) {\\n      return;\\n    }\\n\\n    const params = new URLSearchParams(search);\\n    attorneyCountryFilter.value = params.get(\\"country\\") || \\"\\";\\n    attorneyRegionFilter.value = params.get(\\"region\\") || \\"\\";\\n    if (!attorneyCountryFilter.value && attorneyRegionFilter.value) {\\n      attorneyCountryFilter.value = inferredCountryForRegionCode(attorneyRegionFilter.value);\\n    }\\n    updateAttorneyCountryLabels();\\n    updateAttorneyRegionOptions();\\n\\n    if (attorneyFiltersPanel) {\\n      attorneyFiltersPanel.hidden = !(attorneyCountryFilter.value || attorneyRegionFilter.value);\\n      updateAttorneyFiltersToggle();\\n      updateAttorneyFiltersClearVisibility();\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  function setAttorneyFiltersLoadingState(isLoading) {\\n    if (!attorneyFiltersPanel) {\\n      return;\\n    }\\n\\n    attorneyFiltersLoading = isLoading;\\n    attorneyFiltersPanel.setAttribute(\\"aria-busy\\", isLoading ? \\"true\\" : \\"false\\");\\n\\n    if (attorneyCountryFilter) {\\n      attorneyCountryFilter.disabled = isLoading;\\n    }\\n\\n    if (attorneyRegionFilter) {\\n      const disabledByCountry = attorneyRegionFilter.dataset.disabledByCountry === \\"true\\";\\n      attorneyRegionFilter.disabled = isLoading || disabledByCountry;\\n    }\\n\\n    const resetLink = attorneyFiltersPanel.querySelector(\\"a\\");\\n    if (resetLink) {\\n      resetLink.setAttribute(\\"aria-disabled\\", isLoading ? \\"true\\" : \\"false\\");\\n      resetLink.tabIndex = isLoading ? -1 : 0;\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  function updateAttorneyFiltersClearVisibility() {\\n    if (!attorneyFiltersPanel || !attorneyCountryFilter || !attorneyRegionFilter) {\\n      return;\\n    }\\n\\n    const resetActions = attorneyFiltersPanel.querySelector(\\"#attorney-filters-actions\\");\\n    if (!resetActions) {\\n      return;\\n    }\\n\\n    resetActions.hidden = !(attorneyCountryFilter.value || attorneyRegionFilter.value);\\n  }\\n\\n  function updateAttorneyCountryLabels() {\\n    if (!attorneyCountryFilter) {\\n      return;\\n    }\\n\\n    const selectedCountry = attorneyCountryFilter.value;\\n    const showSelectedCount = attorneyCountryFilter.dataset.showSelectedCount === \\"true\\";\\n\\n    Array.from(attorneyCountryFilter.options).forEach((option) => {\\n      if (!option.value) {\\n        return;\\n      }\\n\\n      const country = Array.isArray(attorneyFilterMetadata.countries)\\n        ? attorneyFilterMetadata.countries.find((item) => item.code === option.value)\\n        : null;\\n      if (!country) {\\n        return;\\n      }\\n\\n      option.textContent =\\n        option.value === selectedCountry && !showSelectedCount\\n          ? country.label\\n          : `${country.label} (${country.count})`;\\n    });\\n  }\\n\\n  function setAttorneySelectExpandedState(select, isExpanded) {\\n    if (!select) {\\n      return;\\n    }\\n\\n    select.dataset.showSelectedCount = isExpanded ? \\"true\\" : \\"false\\";\\n  }\\n\\n  function setAttorneySelectOpenState(select, isOpen) {\\n    if (!select) {\\n      return;\\n    }\\n\\n    select.classList.toggle(\\"select-open\\", isOpen);\\n  }\\n\\n  function updateAttorneySelectExpandedLabels(isExpanded) {\\n    setAttorneySelectExpandedState(attorneyCountryFilter, isExpanded);\\n    setAttorneySelectExpandedState(attorneyRegionFilter, isExpanded);\\n    updateAttorneyCountryLabels();\\n    updateAttorneyRegionOptions();\\n  }\\n\\n  function inferredCountryForRegionCode(regionCode) {\\n    if (!regionCode) {\\n      return \\"\\";\\n    }\\n\\n    const normalizedRegionCode = regionCode.trim().toLowerCase();\\n    const regionsByCountry =\\n      attorneyFilterMetadata.regions && typeof attorneyFilterMetadata.regions === \\"object\\"\\n        ? attorneyFilterMetadata.regions\\n        : {};\\n\\n    for (const [countryName, countryRegions] of Object.entries(regionsByCountry)) {\\n      if (!Array.isArray(countryRegions)) {\\n        continue;\\n      }\\n\\n      const matchingRegion = countryRegions.find(\\n        (region) => String(region.code).trim().toLowerCase() === normalizedRegionCode,\\n      );\\n      if (matchingRegion) {\\n        return countryName;\\n      }\\n    }\\n\\n    return \\"\\";\\n  }\\n\\n  function updateAttorneyRegionOptions() {\\n    if (!attorneyCountryFilter || !attorneyRegionFilter) {\\n      return;\\n    }\\n\\n    const selectedCountry = attorneyCountryFilter.value;\\n    const selectedRegion = attorneyRegionFilter.value;\\n    const showSelectedCount = attorneyRegionFilter.dataset.showSelectedCount === \\"true\\";\\n    const regionsByCountry =\\n      attorneyFilterMetadata.regions && typeof attorneyFilterMetadata.regions === \\"object\\"\\n        ? attorneyFilterMetadata.regions\\n        : {};\\n    const availableRegions = selectedCountry\\n      ? Array.isArray(regionsByCountry[selectedCountry])\\n        ? regionsByCountry[selectedCountry]\\n        : []\\n      : Object.values(regionsByCountry).flatMap((countryRegions) =>\\n          Array.isArray(countryRegions) ? countryRegions : [],\\n        );\\n\\n    attorneyRegionFilter.innerHTML = \'<option value=\\"\\">All</option>\';\\n\\n    if (selectedCountry) {\\n      availableRegions.forEach((region) => {\\n        const option = document.createElement(\\"option\\");\\n        option.value = region.code;\\n        option.textContent =\\n          region.code === selectedRegion && !showSelectedCount\\n            ? region.label\\n            : `${region.label} (${region.count})`;\\n        if (region.code === selectedRegion) {\\n          option.selected = true;\\n        }\\n        attorneyRegionFilter.appendChild(option);\\n      });\\n    } else {\\n      Object.entries(regionsByCountry).forEach(([countryName, countryRegions]) => {\\n        if (!Array.isArray(countryRegions) || !countryRegions.length) {\\n          return;\\n        }\\n\\n        const optgroup = document.createElement(\\"optgroup\\");\\n        optgroup.label = countryName;\\n\\n        countryRegions.forEach((region) => {\\n          const option = document.createElement(\\"option\\");\\n          option.value = region.code;\\n          option.textContent =\\n            region.code === selectedRegion && !showSelectedCount\\n              ? region.label\\n              : `${region.label} (${region.count})`;\\n          if (region.code === selectedRegion) {\\n            option.selected = true;\\n          }\\n          optgroup.appendChild(option);\\n        });\\n\\n        attorneyRegionFilter.appendChild(optgroup);\\n      });\\n    }\\n\\n    if (!availableRegions.some((region) => region.code === selectedRegion)) {\\n      attorneyRegionFilter.value = \\"\\";\\n    }\\n\\n    const disabledByCountry = !availableRegions.length;\\n    attorneyRegionFilter.dataset.disabledByCountry = disabledByCountry ? \\"true\\" : \\"false\\";\\n    attorneyRegionFilter.disabled = attorneyFiltersLoading || disabledByCountry;\\n    updateAttorneyFiltersClearVisibility();\\n  }\\n\\n  function ensureAttorneyFilterMetadata() {\\n    if (!attorneyCountryFilter || !attorneyRegionFilter) {\\n      return Promise.resolve(null);\\n    }\\n\\n    if (attorneyFilterMetadataRequest) {\\n      return attorneyFilterMetadataRequest;\\n    }\\n\\n      attorneyFilterMetadataRequest = fetch(`${directoryPath}/attorney-filters.json`)\\n      .then((response) => {\\n        if (!response.ok) {\\n          throw new Error(\\"Network response was not ok\\");\\n        }\\n        return response.json();\\n      })\\n      .then((data) => {\\n        attorneyFilterMetadata = data;\\n        updateAttorneyCountryLabels();\\n        updateAttorneyRegionOptions();\\n        return data;\\n      })\\n      .catch((error) => {\\n        attorneyFilterMetadataRequest = null;\\n        console.error(\\"Failed to load attorney filter metadata:\\", error);\\n        return null;\\n      });\\n\\n    return attorneyFilterMetadataRequest;\\n  }\\n\\n  function setDirectoryUrl(search) {\\n    window.history.replaceState(\\n      {},\\n      \\"\\",\\n      `${window.location.pathname}${search}${window.location.hash}`,\\n    );\\n  }\\n\\n  function loadData(search = window.location.search, options = {}) {\\n    const requestOptions = {};\\n    if (options.signal) {\\n      requestOptions.signal = options.signal;\\n    }\\n\\n    return fetch(`${directoryPath}/users.json${search}`, requestOptions)\\n      .then((response) => {\\n        if (!response.ok) {\\n          throw new Error(\\"Network response was not ok\\");\\n        }\\n        return response.json();\\n      })\\n      .then((data) => {\\n        userData = data;\\n        loadedDirectorySearch = search;\\n        updatePublicRecordCountBadge();\\n        refreshInitialMarkup();\\n        handleSearchInput();\\n      });\\n  }\\n\\n  function requestDirectoryData(search = window.location.search, options = {}) {\\n    const { showAttorneyFilterLoadingState = false } = options;\\n\\n    if (directoryDataRequestController) {\\n      directoryDataRequestController.abort();\\n    }\\n\\n    const controller = new AbortController();\\n    directoryDataRequestController = controller;\\n\\n    if (showAttorneyFilterLoadingState) {\\n      setAttorneyFiltersLoadingState(true);\\n    }\\n\\n    return loadData(search, { signal: controller.signal }).finally(() => {\\n      if (directoryDataRequestController === controller) {\\n        directoryDataRequestController = null;\\n        if (showAttorneyFilterLoadingState) {\\n          setAttorneyFiltersLoadingState(false);\\n        }\\n      }\\n    });\\n  }\\n\\n  async function refreshAttorneyResults() {\\n    if (!attorneyFiltersPanel) {\\n      return;\\n    }\\n\\n    const nextSearch = buildAttorneyFilterSearch();\\n    if (attorneyFiltersLoading || loadedDirectorySearch === nextSearch) {\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    setSearchStatus(\\"Updating attorney results.\\");\\n    setDirectoryUrl(nextSearch);\\n\\n    try {\\n      await requestDirectoryData(nextSearch, { showAttorneyFilterLoadingState: true });\\n      if (!searchInput.value.trim()) {\\n        const count = attorneyResultsCount();\\n        setSearchStatus(\\n          count === 1 ? \\"Showing 1 matching attorney.\\" : `Showing ${count} matching attorneys.`,\\n        );\\n      }\\n    } catch (error) {\\n      if (error.name === \\"AbortError\\") {\\n        return;\\n      }\\n\\n      setDirectoryUrl(loadedDirectorySearch);\\n      applyAttorneyFiltersFromSearch(loadedDirectorySearch);\\n      setSearchStatus(\\"Unable to update attorney results.\\");\\n      console.error(\\"Failed to update attorney results:\\", error);\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  if (searchInput) {\\n    searchInput.addEventListener(\\"input\\", handleSearchInput);\\n  }\\n\\n  if (clearIcon) {\\n    clearIcon.addEventListener(\\"click\\", function () {\\n      if (!searchInput) {\\n        return;\\n      }\\n\\n      searchInput.value = \\"\\";\\n      clearIcon.style.visibility = \\"hidden\\";\\n      clearIcon.hidden = true;\\n      clearIcon.setAttribute(\\"aria-hidden\\", \\"true\\");\\n      handleSearchInput();\\n    });\\n  }\\n\\n  if (attorneyFiltersToggle && attorneyFiltersPanel) {\\n    updateAttorneyFiltersToggle();\\n    attorneyFiltersToggle.addEventListener(\\"click\\", function () {\\n      attorneyFiltersPanel.hidden = !attorneyFiltersPanel.hidden;\\n      updateAttorneyFiltersToggle();\\n    });\\n  }\\n\\n  if (attorneyFiltersPanel && attorneyCountryFilter && attorneyRegionFilter) {\\n    const resetLink = attorneyFiltersPanel.querySelector(\\"a\\");\\n    const syncExpandedLabelsOnOpen = function (event) {\\n      if (\\n        event.type === \\"keydown\\" &&\\n        event.key !== \\"ArrowDown\\" &&\\n        event.key !== \\"ArrowUp\\" &&\\n        event.key !== \\"Enter\\" &&\\n        event.key !== \\" \\"\\n      ) {\\n        return;\\n      }\\n\\n      updateAttorneySelectExpandedLabels(true);\\n    };\\n    const syncExpandedLabelsOnClose = function () {\\n      updateAttorneySelectExpandedLabels(false);\\n    };\\n    const syncAttorneyChevronOnOpen = function (event) {\\n      if (\\n        event.type === \\"keydown\\" &&\\n        event.key !== \\"ArrowDown\\" &&\\n        event.key !== \\"ArrowUp\\" &&\\n        event.key !== \\"Enter\\" &&\\n        event.key !== \\" \\"\\n      ) {\\n        return;\\n      }\\n\\n      setAttorneySelectOpenState(event.currentTarget, true);\\n    };\\n    const syncAttorneyChevronOnClose = function (event) {\\n      setAttorneySelectOpenState(event.currentTarget, false);\\n    };\\n\\n    attorneyCountryFilter.addEventListener(\\"change\\", async function () {\\n      await ensureAttorneyFilterMetadata();\\n      updateAttorneyCountryLabels();\\n      updateAttorneyRegionOptions();\\n      syncExpandedLabelsOnClose();\\n      setAttorneySelectOpenState(attorneyCountryFilter, false);\\n      void refreshAttorneyResults();\\n    });\\n\\n    attorneyRegionFilter.addEventListener(\\"change\\", function () {\\n      if (!attorneyCountryFilter.value && attorneyRegionFilter.value) {\\n        attorneyCountryFilter.value = inferredCountryForRegionCode(attorneyRegionFilter.value);\\n        updateAttorneyRegionOptions();\\n      }\\n      updateAttorneyCountryLabels();\\n      updateAttorneyFiltersClearVisibility();\\n      syncExpandedLabelsOnClose();\\n      setAttorneySelectOpenState(attorneyRegionFilter, false);\\n      void refreshAttorneyResults();\\n    });\\n\\n    attorneyCountryFilter.addEventListener(\\"focus\\", syncExpandedLabelsOnOpen);\\n    attorneyCountryFilter.addEventListener(\\"pointerdown\\", syncExpandedLabelsOnOpen);\\n    attorneyCountryFilter.addEventListener(\\"keydown\\", syncExpandedLabelsOnOpen);\\n    attorneyCountryFilter.addEventListener(\\"blur\\", syncExpandedLabelsOnClose);\\n    attorneyCountryFilter.addEventListener(\\"pointerdown\\", syncAttorneyChevronOnOpen);\\n    attorneyCountryFilter.addEventListener(\\"keydown\\", syncAttorneyChevronOnOpen);\\n    attorneyCountryFilter.addEventListener(\\"blur\\", syncAttorneyChevronOnClose);\\n\\n    attorneyRegionFilter.addEventListener(\\"focus\\", syncExpandedLabelsOnOpen);\\n    attorneyRegionFilter.addEventListener(\\"pointerdown\\", syncExpandedLabelsOnOpen);\\n    attorneyRegionFilter.addEventListener(\\"keydown\\", syncExpandedLabelsOnOpen);\\n    attorneyRegionFilter.addEventListener(\\"blur\\", syncExpandedLabelsOnClose);\\n    attorneyRegionFilter.addEventListener(\\"pointerdown\\", syncAttorneyChevronOnOpen);\\n    attorneyRegionFilter.addEventListener(\\"keydown\\", syncAttorneyChevronOnOpen);\\n    attorneyRegionFilter.addEventListener(\\"blur\\", syncAttorneyChevronOnClose);\\n\\n    if (resetLink) {\\n      resetLink.addEventListener(\\"click\\", function (event) {\\n        event.preventDefault();\\n        if (attorneyFiltersLoading) {\\n          return;\\n        }\\n\\n        attorneyCountryFilter.value = \\"\\";\\n        attorneyRegionFilter.value = \\"\\";\\n        updateAttorneyCountryLabels();\\n        updateAttorneyRegionOptions();\\n        syncExpandedLabelsOnClose();\\n        void refreshAttorneyResults();\\n      });\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  window.activateTab = function (selectedTab) {\\n    const targetPanel = document.getElementById(selectedTab.getAttribute(\\"aria-controls\\"));\\n    if (!targetPanel) {\\n      return;\\n    }\\n\\n    tabPanels.forEach((panel) => {\\n      panel.hidden = true;\\n      panel.style.display = \\"none\\";\\n      panel.classList.remove(\\"active\\");\\n    });\\n\\n    tabs.forEach((tab) => {\\n      tab.setAttribute(\\"aria-selected\\", \\"false\\");\\n      tab.classList.remove(\\"active\\");\\n    });\\n\\n    selectedTab.setAttribute(\\"aria-selected\\", \\"true\\");\\n    selectedTab.classList.add(\\"active\\");\\n    targetPanel.hidden = false;\\n    targetPanel.style.display = \\"block\\";\\n    targetPanel.classList.add(\\"active\\");\\n\\n    updateAttorneyFilterVisibility();\\n    updatePlaceholder();\\n    handleSearchInput();\\n  };\\n\\n  tabs.forEach((tab) => {\\n    tab.addEventListener(\\"click\\", function (event) {\\n      const clickedTab = event.currentTarget;\\n      const stickyShell = document.querySelector(\\".directory-sticky-shell\\");\\n      const directoryTabs = document.querySelector(\\".directory-tabs\\");\\n      const isStickyActiveTabClick =\\n        clickedTab.classList.contains(\\"active\\") &&\\n        ((stickyShell && stickyShell.classList.contains(\\"is-sticky\\")) ||\\n          (directoryTabs && directoryTabs.classList.contains(\\"is-sticky\\")));\\n\\n      if (isStickyActiveTabClick) {\\n        const prefersReducedMotion = window.matchMedia(\\"(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)\\")\\n          .matches;\\n        window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: prefersReducedMotion ? \\"auto\\" : \\"smooth\\" });\\n        return;\\n      }\\n\\n      window.activateTab(clickedTab);\\n    });\\n    tab.addEventListener(\\"keydown\\", function (event) {\\n      if (event.key !== \\"ArrowLeft\\" && event.key !== \\"ArrowRight\\") {\\n        return;\\n      }\\n      event.preventDefault();\\n      const tabArray = Array.from(tabs);\\n      const currentIndex = tabArray.indexOf(event.currentTarget);\\n      const direction = event.key === \\"ArrowRight\\" ? 1 : -1;\\n      const nextIndex = (currentIndex + direction + tabArray.length) % tabArray.length;\\n      const nextTab = tabArray[nextIndex];\\n      if (nextTab) {\\n        window.activateTab(nextTab);\\n        nextTab.focus();\\n      }\\n    });\\n  });\\n\\n  const defaultTab = document.querySelector(\\".tab.active\\") || tabs[0];\\n  if (defaultTab) {\\n    window.activateTab(defaultTab);\\n  }\\n\\n  const stickyShell = document.querySelector(\\".directory-sticky-shell\\");\\n  const directoryTabs = document.querySelector(\\".directory-tabs\\");\\n  const searchBox = document.querySelector(\\".directory-search\\");\\n  if (directoryTabs || stickyShell) {\\n    const updateStickyState = () => {\\n      const header = document.querySelector(\\"header\\");\\n      const banner = document.querySelector(\\".banner\\");\\n      const headerHeight = header ? header.getBoundingClientRect().height : 0;\\n      const bannerHeight = banner ? banner.getBoundingClientRect().height : 0;\\n      const stickyTop = headerHeight + bannerHeight;\\n      const stickyAnchor = stickyShell || directoryTabs;\\n\\n      if (stickyAnchor) {\\n        stickyAnchor.style.setProperty(\\"--directory-sticky-top\\", `${stickyTop}px`);\\n        const stickyAnchorTop = stickyAnchor.getBoundingClientRect().top;\\n        const isSticky = window.scrollY > stickyTop + 1 && stickyAnchorTop <= stickyTop;\\n        stickyShell?.classList.toggle(\\"is-sticky\\", isSticky);\\n        directoryTabs?.classList.toggle(\\"is-sticky\\", isSticky);\\n        searchBox?.classList.toggle(\\"is-sticky\\", isSticky);\\n      }\\n    };\\n\\n    updateStickyState();\\n    window.addEventListener(\\"scroll\\", updateStickyState, { passive: true });\\n    window.addEventListener(\\"hashchange\\", () => {\\n      requestAnimationFrame(updateStickyState);\\n    });\\n    window.addEventListener(\\"resize\\", updateStickyState);\\n  }\\n\\n  updatePlaceholder();\\n  void ensureAttorneyFilterMetadata();\\n  requestDirectoryData().catch((error) => {\\n    if (error.name === \\"AbortError\\") {\\n      return;\\n    }\\n\\n    console.error(\\"Failed to load user data:\\", error);\\n  });\\n});\\n\\n\\n//# sourceURL=webpack://hushline/./assets/js/directory_verified.js?\\n}");\n\n/***/ }\n\n/******/ \t});\n/************************************************************************/\n/******/ \t\n/******/ \t// startup\n/******/ \t// Load entry module and return exports\n/******/ \t// This entry module can\'t be inlined because the eval devtool is used.\n/******/ \tvar __webpack_exports__ = {};\n/******/ \t__webpack_modules__["./assets/js/directory_verified.js"]();\n/******/ \t\n/******/ })()\n;'
  
  'eval(' is contained here:
    /*
     * ATTENTION: The "eval" devtool has been used (maybe by default in mode: "development").
     * This devtool is neither made for production nor for readable output files.
     * It uses "eval()" calls to create a separate source file in the browser devtools.
  ?             +++++
     * If you are trying to read the output file, select a different devtool (https://webpack.js.org/configuration/devtool/)
     * or disable the default devtool with "devtool: false".
     * If you are looking for production-ready output files, see mode: "production" (https://webpack.js.org/configuration/mode/).
     */
    /******/ (() => { // webpackBootstrap
    /******/ 	var __webpack_modules__ = ({
    
    /***/ "./assets/js/directory_verified.js"
    /*!*****************************************!*\
      !*** ./assets/js/directory_verified.js ***!
      \*****************************************/
    () {
    
    eval("{document.addEventListener(\"DOMContentLoaded\", function () {\n  const userSearch = window.HushlineUserSearch;\n  const directoryPath = window.location.pathname.replace(/\\/$/, \"\");\n  const tabs = document.querySelectorAll(\".tab[data-tab]\");\n  const tabPanels = document.querySelectorAll(\".tab-content\");\n  const searchInput = document.getElementById(\"searchInput\");\n  const clearIcon = document.getElementById(\"clearIcon\");\n  const searchStatus = document.getElementById(\"directory-search-status\");\n  const publicRecordCountBadge = document.getElementById(\"public-record-count\");\n  const attorneyFiltersToggleShell = document.getElementById(\"attorney-filters-toggle-shell\");\n  const attorneyFiltersPanelShell = document.getElementById(\"attorney-filters-panel-shell\");\n  const attorneyFiltersToggle = document.getElementById(\"attorney-filters-toggle\");\n  const attorneyFiltersPanel = document.getElementById(\"attorney-filters-panel\");\n  const attorneyCountryFilter = document.getElementById(\"attorney-country-filter\");\n  const attorneyRegionFilter = document.getElementById(\"attorney-region-filter\");\n  const initialMarkup = new Map();\n  let userData = [];\n  let hasRenderedSearch = false;\n  let attorneyFiltersLoading = false;\n  let attorneyFilterMetadata = { countries: [], regions: {} };\n  let attorneyFilterMetadataRequest = null;\n  let directoryDataRequestController = null;\n  let loadedDirectorySearch = window.location.search;\n\n  tabPanels.forEach((panel) => {\n    initialMarkup.set(panel.id, panel.innerHTML);\n  });\n\n  function setSearchStatus(message) {\n    if (searchStatus) {\n      searchStatus.textContent = message;\n    }\n  }\n\n  function updateAttorneyFiltersToggle() {\n    if (!attorneyFiltersToggle || !attorneyFiltersPanel) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const isExpanded = !attorneyFiltersPanel.hidden;\n    attorneyFiltersToggle.setAttribute(\"aria-expanded\", isExpanded ? \"true\" : \"false\");\n    attorneyFiltersToggle.textContent = isExpanded ? \"Hide Filters\" : \"Show Filters\";\n  }\n\n  function updateAttorneyFilterVisibility() {\n    const attorneyTabIsActive = activeTabName() === \"public-records\";\n\n    if (attorneyFiltersToggleShell) {\n      attorneyFiltersToggleShell.hidden = !attorneyTabIsActive;\n    }\n\n    if (attorneyFiltersPanelShell) {\n      attorneyFiltersPanelShell.hidden = !attorneyTabIsActive;\n    }\n  }\n\n  function activeTabName() {\n    return document.querySelector(\".tab.active\")?.getAttribute(\"data-tab\") || \"all\";\n  }\n\n  function activePanel() {\n    return document.querySelector(\".tab-content.active\") || document.getElementById(\"all\");\n  }\n\n  function attorneyResultsCount() {\n    return filterUsers(\"\", \"public-records\").length;\n  }\n\n  function updatePublicRecordCountBadge() {\n    if (publicRecordCountBadge) {\n      publicRecordCountBadge.textContent = attorneyResultsCount().toString();\n    }\n  }\n\n  function updatePlaceholder() {\n    const activeTab = activeTabName();\n    if (!searchInput) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (activeTab === \"verified\") {\n      searchInput.placeholder = \"Search verified users...\";\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (activeTab === \"public-records\") {\n      searchInput.placeholder = \"Search attorneys...\";\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (activeTab === \"globaleaks\") {\n      searchInput.placeholder = \"Search GlobaLeaks instances...\";\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (activeTab === \"securedrop\") {\n      searchInput.placeholder = \"Search SecureDrop instances...\";\n      return;\n    }\n\n    searchInput.placeholder = \"Search directory...\";\n  }\n\n  function scopeLabel() {\n    const activeTab = activeTabName();\n    if (activeTab === \"verified\") {\n      return \"verified users\";\n    }\n\n    if (activeTab === \"public-records\") {\n      return \"attorneys\";\n    }\n\n    if (activeTab === \"globaleaks\") {\n      return \"GlobaLeaks instances\";\n    }\n\n    if (activeTab === \"securedrop\") {\n      return \"SecureDrop instances\";\n    }\n\n    return \"directory entries\";\n  }\n\n  function matchesTab(user, tab) {\n    if (\n      tab === \"verified\" &&\n      (!user.is_verified || user.is_public_record || user.is_globaleaks || user.is_securedrop)\n    ) {\n      return false;\n    }\n\n    if (tab === \"public-records\" && !user.is_public_record) {\n      return false;\n    }\n\n    if (tab === \"globaleaks\" && !user.is_globaleaks) {\n      return false;\n    }\n\n    if (tab === \"securedrop\" && !user.is_securedrop) {\n      return false;\n    }\n\n    return true;\n  }\n\n  function filterUsers(query, tab = activeTabName()) {\n    const normalizedQuery = query.trim().toLowerCase();\n\n    return userData.filter((user) => {\n      if (!matchesTab(user, tab)) {\n        return false;\n      }\n\n      if (normalizedQuery === \"\") {\n        return true;\n      }\n\n      const countries = Array.isArray(user.countries) ? user.countries.join(\" \") : \"\";\n      const searchText = userSearch.normalizeSearchText([\n        user.primary_username,\n        user.display_name,\n        user.bio,\n        user.city,\n        user.country,\n        user.subdivision,\n        countries,\n      ]);\n      return userSearch.matchesQuery(searchText, normalizedQuery);\n    });\n  }\n\n  function highlightMatch(text, query) {\n    return userSearch.highlightQuery(text || \"\", query);\n  }\n\n  function sortedByDisplayName(entries) {\n    return [...entries].sort((a, b) =>\n      (a.display_name || \"\").localeCompare(b.display_name || \"\", undefined, {\n        sensitivity: \"base\",\n      }),\n    );\n  }\n\n  function buildBadges(user, tab) {\n    let badgeContainer = \"\";\n\n    if (user.is_public_record) {\n      if (tab === \"all\") {\n        badgeContainer +=\n          '<span class=\"badge\" role=\"img\" aria-label=\"Attorney listing\">⚖️ Attorney</span>';\n      }\n      if (user.is_automated) {\n        badgeContainer +=\n          '<span class=\"badge\" role=\"img\" aria-label=\"Automated listing\">🤖 Automated</span>';\n      }\n      return badgeContainer;\n    }\n\n    if (user.is_securedrop) {\n      if (tab !== \"securedrop\") {\n        badgeContainer +=\n          '<span class=\"badge\" role=\"img\" aria-label=\"SecureDrop listing\">🛡️ SecureDrop</span>';\n      }\n      if (user.is_automated) {\n        badgeContainer +=\n          '<span class=\"badge\" role=\"img\" aria-label=\"Automated listing\">🤖 Automated</span>';\n      }\n      return badgeContainer;\n    }\n\n    if (user.is_globaleaks) {\n      if (tab !== \"globaleaks\") {\n        badgeContainer +=\n          '<span class=\"badge\" role=\"img\" aria-label=\"GlobaLeaks listing\">🌐 GlobaLeaks</span>';\n      }\n      if (user.is_automated) {\n        badgeContainer +=\n          '<span class=\"badge\" role=\"img\" aria-label=\"Automated listing\">🤖 Automated</span>';\n      }\n      return badgeContainer;\n    }\n\n    if (user.is_admin) {\n      badgeContainer +=\n        '<span class=\"badge\" role=\"img\" aria-label=\"Administrator account\">⚙️ Admin</span>';\n    }\n\n    if (user.is_verified) {\n      badgeContainer +=\n        '<span class=\"badge\" role=\"img\" aria-label=\"Verified account\">⭐️ Verified</span>';\n    }\n\n    if (tab === \"all\" && !user.has_pgp_key) {\n      badgeContainer +=\n        '<span class=\"badge\" role=\"img\" aria-label=\"Info-only account\">📇 Info Only</span>';\n    }\n\n    return badgeContainer;\n  }\n\n  function buildAutomatedListingCard(user, query, tab) {\n    const safeDisplayName = userSearch.escapeHtml(user.display_name || \"\");\n    const safeBio = userSearch.escapeHtml(user.bio || \"No description\");\n    const safeProfileUrl = userSearch.escapeHtml(user.profile_url || \"#\");\n    const displayNameHighlighted = highlightMatch(user.display_name, query);\n    const bioHighlighted = user.bio ? highlightMatch(user.bio, query) : \"\";\n    let listingType = \"SecureDrop listing\";\n    if (user.is_public_record) {\n      listingType = \"Public record listing\";\n    } else if (user.is_globaleaks) {\n      listingType = \"GlobaLeaks listing\";\n    }\n    const safeListingType = userSearch.escapeHtml(listingType);\n\n    return `\n      <article class=\"user\" aria-label=\"${safeListingType}, Display name:${safeDisplayName}, Description: ${safeBio}\">\n        <h3>${displayNameHighlighted}</h3>\n        <div class=\"badgeContainer\">${buildBadges(user, tab)}</div>\n        ${bioHighlighted ? `<p class=\"bio\">${bioHighlighted}</p>` : \"\"}\n        <div class=\"user-actions\">\n          <a href=\"${safeProfileUrl}\" aria-label=\"View read-only listing for ${safeDisplayName}\">View Listing</a>\n        </div>\n      </article>\n    `;\n  }\n\n  function buildUserCard(user, query, tab) {\n    const safeDisplayName = userSearch.escapeHtml(\n      user.display_name || user.primary_username || \"\",\n    );\n    const safeUsername = userSearch.escapeHtml(user.primary_username || \"\");\n    const safeBio = userSearch.escapeHtml(user.bio || \"No bio\");\n    const safeProfileUrl = userSearch.escapeHtml(user.profile_url || \"#\");\n    const displayNameHighlighted = highlightMatch(\n      user.display_name || user.primary_username,\n      query,\n    );\n    const usernameHighlighted = highlightMatch(user.primary_username, query);\n    const bioHighlighted = user.bio ? highlightMatch(user.bio, query) : \"\";\n\n    if (user.is_public_record || user.is_globaleaks || user.is_securedrop) {\n      return buildAutomatedListingCard(user, query, tab);\n    }\n\n    const userType = user.is_admin\n      ? `${user.is_verified ? \"Verified\" : \"\"} admin user`\n      : `${user.is_verified ? \"Verified\" : \"\"} User`;\n    const safeUserType = userSearch.escapeHtml(userType);\n    const badges = buildBadges(user, tab);\n\n    return `\n      <article class=\"user\" aria-label=\"${safeUserType}, Display name:${safeDisplayName}, Username: ${safeUsername}, Bio: ${safeBio}\">\n        <h3>${displayNameHighlighted}</h3>\n        <p class=\"meta\">@${usernameHighlighted}</p>\n        ${badges ? `<div class=\"badgeContainer\">${badges}</div>` : \"\"}\n        ${bioHighlighted ? `<p class=\"bio\">${bioHighlighted}</p>` : \"\"}\n        <div class=\"user-actions\">\n          <a href=\"${safeProfileUrl}\" aria-label=\"${safeDisplayName}'s profile\">View Profile</a>\n        </div>\n      </article>\n    `;\n  }\n\n  function appendSection(panel, label, users, query, tab) {\n    if (!users.length) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (label) {\n      const sectionLabel = document.createElement(\"p\");\n      sectionLabel.className = \"label searchLabel\";\n      sectionLabel.textContent = label;\n      panel.appendChild(sectionLabel);\n    }\n\n    const userListContainer = document.createElement(\"div\");\n    userListContainer.className = \"user-list\";\n    userListContainer.innerHTML = users.map((user) => buildUserCard(user, query, tab)).join(\"\");\n    panel.appendChild(userListContainer);\n  }\n\n  function renderPanelContent(\n    panel,\n    users,\n    query,\n    tab,\n    { introMarkup = \"\", showEmptyMessage = true } = {},\n  ) {\n    panel.innerHTML = introMarkup;\n\n    if (users.length === 0) {\n      if (showEmptyMessage) {\n        panel.insertAdjacentHTML(\n          \"beforeend\",\n          '<p class=\"empty-message\"><span class=\"emoji-message\">🫥</span><br>No users found.</p>',\n        );\n      }\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const realUsers = users.filter(\n      (user) => !user.is_public_record && !user.is_globaleaks && !user.is_securedrop,\n    );\n    const withPgp = realUsers.filter((user) => user.has_pgp_key);\n    const infoOnly = realUsers.filter((user) => !user.has_pgp_key);\n\n    if (tab === \"all\") {\n      appendSection(panel, \"\", sortedByDisplayName(users), query, tab);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (tab === \"verified\") {\n      appendSection(panel, \"\", withPgp, query, tab);\n      appendSection(panel, \"📇 Info-Only Accounts\", infoOnly, query, tab);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    appendSection(panel, \"\", users, query, tab);\n  }\n\n  function displayUsers(users, query) {\n    const panel = activePanel();\n    const tab = activeTabName();\n    if (!panel) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    renderPanelContent(panel, users, query, tab);\n  }\n\n  function panelIntroMarkup(panelId) {\n    return document.getElementById(panelId)?.querySelector(\".dirMeta\")?.outerHTML || \"\";\n  }\n\n  function buildDefaultPanelMarkup(tab) {\n    const panel = document.createElement(\"div\");\n    const introMarkup = panelIntroMarkup(tab);\n    const showEmptyMessage = tab !== \"public-records\";\n\n    renderPanelContent(panel, filterUsers(\"\", tab), \"\", tab, {\n      introMarkup,\n      showEmptyMessage,\n    });\n\n    return panel.innerHTML;\n  }\n\n  function refreshInitialMarkup() {\n    if (document.getElementById(\"public-records\")) {\n      initialMarkup.set(\"public-records\", buildDefaultPanelMarkup(\"public-records\"));\n    }\n\n    if (document.getElementById(\"all\")) {\n      initialMarkup.set(\"all\", buildDefaultPanelMarkup(\"all\"));\n    }\n  }\n\n  function handleSearchInput() {\n    const query = searchInput.value.trim();\n    const panel = activePanel();\n    const currentScopeLabel = scopeLabel();\n    const hasQuery = query.length > 0;\n\n    if (clearIcon) {\n      clearIcon.style.visibility = hasQuery ? \"visible\" : \"hidden\";\n      clearIcon.hidden = !hasQuery;\n      clearIcon.setAttribute(\"aria-hidden\", hasQuery ? \"false\" : \"true\");\n    }\n\n    if (query.length === 0) {\n      if (panel && initialMarkup.has(panel.id)) {\n        panel.innerHTML = initialMarkup.get(panel.id);\n      }\n      if (hasRenderedSearch) {\n        setSearchStatus(`Showing all ${currentScopeLabel}.`);\n      }\n      hasRenderedSearch = false;\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const filteredUsers = filterUsers(query);\n    displayUsers(filteredUsers, query);\n    setSearchStatus(\n      filteredUsers.length === 1\n        ? `Found 1 ${currentScopeLabel.slice(0, -1)} matching \"${query}\".`\n        : `Found ${filteredUsers.length} ${currentScopeLabel} matching \"${query}\".`,\n    );\n    hasRenderedSearch = true;\n  }\n\n  function buildAttorneyFilterSearch() {\n    const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);\n    const country = attorneyCountryFilter?.value.trim() || \"\";\n    const region = attorneyRegionFilter?.value.trim() || \"\";\n\n    if (country) {\n      params.set(\"country\", country);\n    } else {\n      params.delete(\"country\");\n    }\n\n    if (region) {\n      params.set(\"region\", region);\n    } else {\n      params.delete(\"region\");\n    }\n\n    const nextSearch = params.toString();\n    return nextSearch ? `?${nextSearch}` : \"\";\n  }\n\n  function applyAttorneyFiltersFromSearch(search) {\n    if (!attorneyCountryFilter || !attorneyRegionFilter) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const params = new URLSearchParams(search);\n    attorneyCountryFilter.value = params.get(\"country\") || \"\";\n    attorneyRegionFilter.value = params.get(\"region\") || \"\";\n    if (!attorneyCountryFilter.value && attorneyRegionFilter.value) {\n      attorneyCountryFilter.value = inferredCountryForRegionCode(attorneyRegionFilter.value);\n    }\n    updateAttorneyCountryLabels();\n    updateAttorneyRegionOptions();\n\n    if (attorneyFiltersPanel) {\n      attorneyFiltersPanel.hidden = !(attorneyCountryFilter.value || attorneyRegionFilter.value);\n      updateAttorneyFiltersToggle();\n      updateAttorneyFiltersClearVisibility();\n    }\n  }\n\n  function setAttorneyFiltersLoadingState(isLoading) {\n    if (!attorneyFiltersPanel) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    attorneyFiltersLoading = isLoading;\n    attorneyFiltersPanel.setAttribute(\"aria-busy\", isLoading ? \"true\" : \"false\");\n\n    if (attorneyCountryFilter) {\n      attorneyCountryFilter.disabled = isLoading;\n    }\n\n    if (attorneyRegionFilter) {\n      const disabledByCountry = attorneyRegionFilter.dataset.disabledByCountry === \"true\";\n      attorneyRegionFilter.disabled = isLoading || disabledByCountry;\n    }\n\n    const resetLink = attorneyFiltersPanel.querySelector(\"a\");\n    if (resetLink) {\n      resetLink.setAttribute(\"aria-disabled\", isLoading ? \"true\" : \"false\");\n      resetLink.tabIndex = isLoading ? -1 : 0;\n    }\n  }\n\n  function updateAttorneyFiltersClearVisibility() {\n    if (!attorneyFiltersPanel || !attorneyCountryFilter || !attorneyRegionFilter) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const resetActions = attorneyFiltersPanel.querySelector(\"#attorney-filters-actions\");\n    if (!resetActions) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    resetActions.hidden = !(attorneyCountryFilter.value || attorneyRegionFilter.value);\n  }\n\n  function updateAttorneyCountryLabels() {\n    if (!attorneyCountryFilter) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const selectedCountry = attorneyCountryFilter.value;\n    const showSelectedCount = attorneyCountryFilter.dataset.showSelectedCount === \"true\";\n\n    Array.from(attorneyCountryFilter.options).forEach((option) => {\n      if (!option.value) {\n        return;\n      }\n\n      const country = Array.isArray(attorneyFilterMetadata.countries)\n        ? attorneyFilterMetadata.countries.find((item) => item.code === option.value)\n        : null;\n      if (!country) {\n        return;\n      }\n\n      option.textContent =\n        option.value === selectedCountry && !showSelectedCount\n          ? country.label\n          : `${country.label} (${country.count})`;\n    });\n  }\n\n  function setAttorneySelectExpandedState(select, isExpanded) {\n    if (!select) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    select.dataset.showSelectedCount = isExpanded ? \"true\" : \"false\";\n  }\n\n  function setAttorneySelectOpenState(select, isOpen) {\n    if (!select) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    select.classList.toggle(\"select-open\", isOpen);\n  }\n\n  function updateAttorneySelectExpandedLabels(isExpanded) {\n    setAttorneySelectExpandedState(attorneyCountryFilter, isExpanded);\n    setAttorneySelectExpandedState(attorneyRegionFilter, isExpanded);\n    updateAttorneyCountryLabels();\n    updateAttorneyRegionOptions();\n  }\n\n  function inferredCountryForRegionCode(regionCode) {\n    if (!regionCode) {\n      return \"\";\n    }\n\n    const normalizedRegionCode = regionCode.trim().toLowerCase();\n    const regionsByCountry =\n      attorneyFilterMetadata.regions && typeof attorneyFilterMetadata.regions === \"object\"\n        ? attorneyFilterMetadata.regions\n        : {};\n\n    for (const [countryName, countryRegions] of Object.entries(regionsByCountry)) {\n      if (!Array.isArray(countryRegions)) {\n        continue;\n      }\n\n      const matchingRegion = countryRegions.find(\n        (region) => String(region.code).trim().toLowerCase() === normalizedRegionCode,\n      );\n      if (matchingRegion) {\n        return countryName;\n      }\n    }\n\n    return \"\";\n  }\n\n  function updateAttorneyRegionOptions() {\n    if (!attorneyCountryFilter || !attorneyRegionFilter) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const selectedCountry = attorneyCountryFilter.value;\n    const selectedRegion = attorneyRegionFilter.value;\n    const showSelectedCount = attorneyRegionFilter.dataset.showSelectedCount === \"true\";\n    const regionsByCountry =\n      attorneyFilterMetadata.regions && typeof attorneyFilterMetadata.regions === \"object\"\n        ? attorneyFilterMetadata.regions\n        : {};\n    const availableRegions = selectedCountry\n      ? Array.isArray(regionsByCountry[selectedCountry])\n        ? regionsByCountry[selectedCountry]\n        : []\n      : Object.values(regionsByCountry).flatMap((countryRegions) =>\n          Array.isArray(countryRegions) ? countryRegions : [],\n        );\n\n    attorneyRegionFilter.innerHTML = '<option value=\"\">All</option>';\n\n    if (selectedCountry) {\n      availableRegions.forEach((region) => {\n        const option = document.createElement(\"option\");\n        option.value = region.code;\n        option.textContent =\n          region.code === selectedRegion && !showSelectedCount\n            ? region.label\n            : `${region.label} (${region.count})`;\n        if (region.code === selectedRegion) {\n          option.selected = true;\n        }\n        attorneyRegionFilter.appendChild(option);\n      });\n    } else {\n      Object.entries(regionsByCountry).forEach(([countryName, countryRegions]) => {\n        if (!Array.isArray(countryRegions) || !countryRegions.length) {\n          return;\n        }\n\n        const optgroup = document.createElement(\"optgroup\");\n        optgroup.label = countryName;\n\n        countryRegions.forEach((region) => {\n          const option = document.createElement(\"option\");\n          option.value = region.code;\n          option.textContent =\n            region.code === selectedRegion && !showSelectedCount\n              ? region.label\n              : `${region.label} (${region.count})`;\n          if (region.code === selectedRegion) {\n            option.selected = true;\n          }\n          optgroup.appendChild(option);\n        });\n\n        attorneyRegionFilter.appendChild(optgroup);\n      });\n    }\n\n    if (!availableRegions.some((region) => region.code === selectedRegion)) {\n      attorneyRegionFilter.value = \"\";\n    }\n\n    const disabledByCountry = !availableRegions.length;\n    attorneyRegionFilter.dataset.disabledByCountry = disabledByCountry ? \"true\" : \"false\";\n    attorneyRegionFilter.disabled = attorneyFiltersLoading || disabledByCountry;\n    updateAttorneyFiltersClearVisibility();\n  }\n\n  function ensureAttorneyFilterMetadata() {\n    if (!attorneyCountryFilter || !attorneyRegionFilter) {\n      return Promise.resolve(null);\n    }\n\n    if (attorneyFilterMetadataRequest) {\n      return attorneyFilterMetadataRequest;\n    }\n\n      attorneyFilterMetadataRequest = fetch(`${directoryPath}/attorney-filters.json`)\n      .then((response) => {\n        if (!response.ok) {\n          throw new Error(\"Network response was not ok\");\n        }\n        return response.json();\n      })\n      .then((data) => {\n        attorneyFilterMetadata = data;\n        updateAttorneyCountryLabels();\n        updateAttorneyRegionOptions();\n        return data;\n      })\n      .catch((error) => {\n        attorneyFilterMetadataRequest = null;\n        console.error(\"Failed to load attorney filter metadata:\", error);\n        return null;\n      });\n\n    return attorneyFilterMetadataRequest;\n  }\n\n  function setDirectoryUrl(search) {\n    window.history.replaceState(\n      {},\n      \"\",\n      `${window.location.pathname}${search}${window.location.hash}`,\n    );\n  }\n\n  function loadData(search = window.location.search, options = {}) {\n    const requestOptions = {};\n    if (options.signal) {\n      requestOptions.signal = options.signal;\n    }\n\n    return fetch(`${directoryPath}/users.json${search}`, requestOptions)\n      .then((response) => {\n        if (!response.ok) {\n          throw new Error(\"Network response was not ok\");\n        }\n        return response.json();\n      })\n      .then((data) => {\n        userData = data;\n        loadedDirectorySearch = search;\n        updatePublicRecordCountBadge();\n        refreshInitialMarkup();\n        handleSearchInput();\n      });\n  }\n\n  function requestDirectoryData(search = window.location.search, options = {}) {\n    const { showAttorneyFilterLoadingState = false } = options;\n\n    if (directoryDataRequestController) {\n      directoryDataRequestController.abort();\n    }\n\n    const controller = new AbortController();\n    directoryDataRequestController = controller;\n\n    if (showAttorneyFilterLoadingState) {\n      setAttorneyFiltersLoadingState(true);\n    }\n\n    return loadData(search, { signal: controller.signal }).finally(() => {\n      if (directoryDataRequestController === controller) {\n        directoryDataRequestController = null;\n        if (showAttorneyFilterLoadingState) {\n          setAttorneyFiltersLoadingState(false);\n        }\n      }\n    });\n  }\n\n  async function refreshAttorneyResults() {\n    if (!attorneyFiltersPanel) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const nextSearch = buildAttorneyFilterSearch();\n    if (attorneyFiltersLoading || loadedDirectorySearch === nextSearch) {\n      return;\n    }\n    setSearchStatus(\"Updating attorney results.\");\n    setDirectoryUrl(nextSearch);\n\n    try {\n      await requestDirectoryData(nextSearch, { showAttorneyFilterLoadingState: true });\n      if (!searchInput.value.trim()) {\n        const count = attorneyResultsCount();\n        setSearchStatus(\n          count === 1 ? \"Showing 1 matching attorney.\" : `Showing ${count} matching attorneys.`,\n        );\n      }\n    } catch (error) {\n      if (error.name === \"AbortError\") {\n        return;\n      }\n\n      setDirectoryUrl(loadedDirectorySearch);\n      applyAttorneyFiltersFromSearch(loadedDirectorySearch);\n      setSearchStatus(\"Unable to update attorney results.\");\n      console.error(\"Failed to update attorney results:\", error);\n    }\n  }\n\n  if (searchInput) {\n    searchInput.addEventListener(\"input\", handleSearchInput);\n  }\n\n  if (clearIcon) {\n    clearIcon.addEventListener(\"click\", function () {\n      if (!searchInput) {\n        return;\n      }\n\n      searchInput.value = \"\";\n      clearIcon.style.visibility = \"hidden\";\n      clearIcon.hidden = true;\n      clearIcon.setAttribute(\"aria-hidden\", \"true\");\n      handleSearchInput();\n    });\n  }\n\n  if (attorneyFiltersToggle && attorneyFiltersPanel) {\n    updateAttorneyFiltersToggle();\n    attorneyFiltersToggle.addEventListener(\"click\", function () {\n      attorneyFiltersPanel.hidden = !attorneyFiltersPanel.hidden;\n      updateAttorneyFiltersToggle();\n    });\n  }\n\n  if (attorneyFiltersPanel && attorneyCountryFilter && attorneyRegionFilter) {\n    const resetLink = attorneyFiltersPanel.querySelector(\"a\");\n    const syncExpandedLabelsOnOpen = function (event) {\n      if (\n        event.type === \"keydown\" &&\n        event.key !== \"ArrowDown\" &&\n        event.key !== \"ArrowUp\" &&\n        event.key !== \"Enter\" &&\n        event.key !== \" \"\n      ) {\n        return;\n      }\n\n      updateAttorneySelectExpandedLabels(true);\n    };\n    const syncExpandedLabelsOnClose = function () {\n      updateAttorneySelectExpandedLabels(false);\n    };\n    const syncAttorneyChevronOnOpen = function (event) {\n      if (\n        event.type === \"keydown\" &&\n        event.key !== \"ArrowDown\" &&\n        event.key !== \"ArrowUp\" &&\n        event.key !== \"Enter\" &&\n        event.key !== \" \"\n      ) {\n        return;\n      }\n\n      setAttorneySelectOpenState(event.currentTarget, true);\n    };\n    const syncAttorneyChevronOnClose = function (event) {\n      setAttorneySelectOpenState(event.currentTarget, false);\n    };\n\n    attorneyCountryFilter.addEventListener(\"change\", async function () {\n      await ensureAttorneyFilterMetadata();\n      updateAttorneyCountryLabels();\n      updateAttorneyRegionOptions();\n      syncExpandedLabelsOnClose();\n      setAttorneySelectOpenState(attorneyCountryFilter, false);\n      void refreshAttorneyResults();\n    });\n\n    attorneyRegionFilter.addEventListener(\"change\", function () {\n      if (!attorneyCountryFilter.value && attorneyRegionFilter.value) {\n        attorneyCountryFilter.value = inferredCountryForRegionCode(attorneyRegionFilter.value);\n        updateAttorneyRegionOptions();\n      }\n      updateAttorneyCountryLabels();\n      updateAttorneyFiltersClearVisibility();\n      syncExpandedLabelsOnClose();\n      setAttorneySelectOpenState(attorneyRegionFilter, false);\n      void refreshAttorneyResults();\n    });\n\n    attorneyCountryFilter.addEventListener(\"focus\", syncExpandedLabelsOnOpen);\n    attorneyCountryFilter.addEventListener(\"pointerdown\", syncExpandedLabelsOnOpen);\n    attorneyCountryFilter.addEventListener(\"keydown\", syncExpandedLabelsOnOpen);\n    attorneyCountryFilter.addEventListener(\"blur\", syncExpandedLabelsOnClose);\n    attorneyCountryFilter.addEventListener(\"pointerdown\", syncAttorneyChevronOnOpen);\n    attorneyCountryFilter.addEventListener(\"keydown\", syncAttorneyChevronOnOpen);\n    attorneyCountryFilter.addEventListener(\"blur\", syncAttorneyChevronOnClose);\n\n    attorneyRegionFilter.addEventListener(\"focus\", syncExpandedLabelsOnOpen);\n    attorneyRegionFilter.addEventListener(\"pointerdown\", syncExpandedLabelsOnOpen);\n    attorneyRegionFilter.addEventListener(\"keydown\", syncExpandedLabelsOnOpen);\n    attorneyRegionFilter.addEventListener(\"blur\", syncExpandedLabelsOnClose);\n    attorneyRegionFilter.addEventListener(\"pointerdown\", syncAttorneyChevronOnOpen);\n    attorneyRegionFilter.addEventListener(\"keydown\", syncAttorneyChevronOnOpen);\n    attorneyRegionFilter.addEventListener(\"blur\", syncAttorneyChevronOnClose);\n\n    if (resetLink) {\n      resetLink.addEventListener(\"click\", function (event) {\n        event.preventDefault();\n        if (attorneyFiltersLoading) {\n          return;\n        }\n\n        attorneyCountryFilter.value = \"\";\n        attorneyRegionFilter.value = \"\";\n        updateAttorneyCountryLabels();\n        updateAttorneyRegionOptions();\n        syncExpandedLabelsOnClose();\n        void refreshAttorneyResults();\n      });\n    }\n  }\n\n  window.activateTab = function (selectedTab) {\n    const targetPanel = document.getElementById(selectedTab.getAttribute(\"aria-controls\"));\n    if (!targetPanel) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    tabPanels.forEach((panel) => {\n      panel.hidden = true;\n      panel.style.display = \"none\";\n      panel.classList.remove(\"active\");\n    });\n\n    tabs.forEach((tab) => {\n      tab.setAttribute(\"aria-selected\", \"false\");\n      tab.classList.remove(\"active\");\n    });\n\n    selectedTab.setAttribute(\"aria-selected\", \"true\");\n    selectedTab.classList.add(\"active\");\n    targetPanel.hidden = false;\n    targetPanel.style.display = \"block\";\n    targetPanel.classList.add(\"active\");\n\n    updateAttorneyFilterVisibility();\n    updatePlaceholder();\n    handleSearchInput();\n  };\n\n  tabs.forEach((tab) => {\n    tab.addEventListener(\"click\", function (event) {\n      const clickedTab = event.currentTarget;\n      const stickyShell = document.querySelector(\".directory-sticky-shell\");\n      const directoryTabs = document.querySelector(\".directory-tabs\");\n      const isStickyActiveTabClick =\n        clickedTab.classList.contains(\"active\") &&\n        ((stickyShell && stickyShell.classList.contains(\"is-sticky\")) ||\n          (directoryTabs && directoryTabs.classList.contains(\"is-sticky\")));\n\n      if (isStickyActiveTabClick) {\n        const prefersReducedMotion = window.matchMedia(\"(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)\")\n          .matches;\n        window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: prefersReducedMotion ? \"auto\" : \"smooth\" });\n        return;\n      }\n\n      window.activateTab(clickedTab);\n    });\n    tab.addEventListener(\"keydown\", function (event) {\n      if (event.key !== \"ArrowLeft\" && event.key !== \"ArrowRight\") {\n        return;\n      }\n      event.preventDefault();\n      const tabArray = Array.from(tabs);\n      const currentIndex = tabArray.indexOf(event.currentTarget);\n      const direction = event.key === \"ArrowRight\" ? 1 : -1;\n      const nextIndex = (currentIndex + direction + tabArray.length) % tabArray.length;\n      const nextTab = tabArray[nextIndex];\n      if (nextTab) {\n        window.activateTab(nextTab);\n        nextTab.focus();\n      }\n    });\n  });\n\n  const defaultTab = document.querySelector(\".tab.active\") || tabs[0];\n  if (defaultTab) {\n    window.activateTab(defaultTab);\n  }\n\n  const stickyShell = document.querySelector(\".directory-sticky-shell\");\n  const directoryTabs = document.querySelector(\".directory-tabs\");\n  const searchBox = document.querySelector(\".directory-search\");\n  if (directoryTabs || stickyShell) {\n    const updateStickyState = () => {\n      const header = document.querySelector(\"header\");\n      const banner = document.querySelector(\".banner\");\n      const headerHeight = header ? header.getBoundingClientRect().height : 0;\n      const bannerHeight = banner ? banner.getBoundingClientRect().height : 0;\n      const stickyTop = headerHeight + bannerHeight;\n      const stickyAnchor = stickyShell || directoryTabs;\n\n      if (stickyAnchor) {\n        stickyAnchor.style.setProperty(\"--directory-sticky-top\", `${stickyTop}px`);\n        const stickyAnchorTop = stickyAnchor.getBoundingClientRect().top;\n        const isSticky = window.scrollY > stickyTop + 1 && stickyAnchorTop <= stickyTop;\n        stickyShell?.classList.toggle(\"is-sticky\", isSticky);\n        directoryTabs?.classList.toggle(\"is-sticky\", isSticky);\n        searchBox?.classList.toggle(\"is-sticky\", isSticky);\n      }\n    };\n\n    updateStickyState();\n    window.addEventListener(\"scroll\", updateStickyState, { passive: true });\n    window.addEventListener(\"hashchange\", () => {\n      requestAnimationFrame(updateStickyState);\n    });\n    window.addEventListener(\"resize\", updateStickyState);\n  }\n\n  updatePlaceholder();\n  void ensureAttorneyFilterMetadata();\n  requestDirectoryData().catch((error) => {\n    if (error.name === \"AbortError\") {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    console.error(\"Failed to load user data:\", error);\n  });\n});\n\n\n//# sourceURL=webpack://hushline/./assets/js/directory_verified.js?\n}");
    
    /***/ }

  }),\\n    );\\n  }\\n\\n  function buildBadges(user, tab) {\\n    let badgeContainer = \\"\\";\\n\\n    if (user.is_public_record) {\\n      if (tab === \\"all\\") {\\n        badgeContainer +=\\n }\\n\\n  function displayUsers(users, query) {\\n    const panel = activePanel();\\n    const tab = activeTabName();\\n    if (!panel) {\\n      return;\\n    }\\n\\n    renderPanelContent(panel, }\\n\\n    if (document.getElementById(\\"all\\")) {\\n      initialMarkup.set(\\"all\\", buildDefaultPanelMarkup(\\"all\\"));\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  function handleSearchInput() {\\n    const query =  }\\n\\n    if (query.length === 0) {\\n      if (panel && initialMarkup.has(panel.id)) {\\n        panel.innerHTML = initialMarkup.get(panel.id);\\n      }\\n      if (hasRenderedSearch) {\\n
